message:
fix(tests): canonicalize TopologyFixture root to survive macOS /tmp aliasing

After the hook test unpin uncovered `cross_repo_path_deps_e2e` on
macos-arm64, two graph tests failed with:

    package fixture_app_main should be under canonical root

because `TopologyFixture::new` built `canonical_root` from
`std::env::temp_dir()` without canonicalizing, so on macOS the
recorded root lives under `/var/folders/...` (stable) or `/tmp/...`
(symlinked to `/private/tmp/...`), while `package_root` returned by
cargo is always canonical. `starts_with` then fails even though the
package is physically in the same directory tree.

Canonicalize the root immediately after `create_dir_all` so the
recorded `canonical_root` and `alias_root` match the canonical form
cargo's resolver returns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
